abyssinian.description: Abyssinian cats are highly active and curious, known for their sleek coat and playful personality.

american_bobtail.description: American Bobtails are known for their short tails and dog-like personality, being very affectionate and playful.

american_curl.description: American Curl cats are famous for their unique curled ears and friendly nature.

american_shorthair.description: American Shorthair cats are adaptable and easygoing, making them great family pets.

american_wirehair.description: American Wirehair cats have a unique wiry coat and are calm and affectionate companions.

applehead_siamese.description: Applehead Siamese cats are traditional Siamese with a round face and are very vocal and social.
